---
title: "Weather Data Joins"
author: "Joe Leedy"
date: "2026-04-13"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyverse)
library(lubridate)
library(readr)
library(janitor)
library(ggplot2)
library(xts)
library(dygraphs)
library(readxl)
library(stringr)
library(tidygeocoder)
library(httr2)
```

```{r, cache=TRUE, include=FALSE}
#plym_weather <- read_csv("C:/Users/jleedy/Documents/Coursework/SP26/Data Science/solar-incentive-adoption/Sand Project/plymouth_weather.csv")


plym_weather <- read_csv("plymouth_weather.csv")

```

```{r}
plym_weather_trim <- plym_weather|>
  janitor::clean_names() |>
  select(date, hourly_wind_gust_speed, hourly_wind_speed)
```

```{r}
ggplot(filter(plym_weather_trim, month(date) == 4), aes(x = date)) +
  geom_point(aes(y = hourly_wind_speed), size = .1)+
  geom_line(aes(y = hourly_wind_speed),linewidth = .01)+
  geom_point(aes(y = hourly_wind_gust_speed), size = 0.75, color = 'red', shape = 3)+
  theme_classic()+
  labs(x = "Date",
       y = "Wind Speed (MPH)")
```

```{r}
plym_weather_xts <- xts(
  plym_weather_trim %>% select(-date),
  order.by = plym_weather_trim$date
)

dygraph(plym_weather_xts,main="August Wind Speed" ) |> 
  dyRangeSelector() |>
  dyOptions(drawPoints = TRUE, 
            pointSize = 2,
            strokeWidth=1,
            colors = RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(4, "Set1")) #|>
  #dyLegend(width = 1200)

```

# trying to read and clean excel file

```{r, cache=TRUE}
#mine_locs <- read_excel("C:/Users/jleedy/Documents/Coursework/SP26/Data Science/solar-incentive-adoption/Sand Project/mine_locs_2024.xlsx")

mine_locs <- read_excel("mine_locs_2024.xlsx")


mine_locs <- mine_locs |>
  mutate(
    volume_norm = case_when(
      is.na(volume) ~ 0.5,
      TRUE ~ (volume - min(volume, na.rm = TRUE)) /
             (max(volume, na.rm = TRUE) - min(volume, na.rm = TRUE))
    )
  )

clean_address <- function(x) {
  x |>
    # Remove map/lot/parcel references (various formats)
    str_remove_all("\\bMap\\s+[\\w-]+(?:\\s+Lot\\s+[\\w,+\\s-]+)?") |>
    str_remove_all("\\bLot\\s+[\\w,+\\s-]+") |>

    # Remove parenthetical annotations: (Permit 2019), (Solar/Mining), etc.
    str_remove_all("\\([^)]*\\)") |>

    # Remove slash-separated tags that aren't part of the address
    # e.g. "/Solar Circle" is actually a street name — keep; "/Cranebrook Site" — drop
    # Strategy: only drop if the slash-term contains no digits and is all caps-like
    str_remove_all("(?<=/)[A-Z][A-Za-z]+(?:\\s[A-Za-z]+)*(?=\\s|$)") |>

    # Remove trailing asterisks and "**" markers
    str_remove_all("\\*+") |>

    # Remove "ZBA N Permits"-style notes
    str_remove_all("\\bZBA\\b.*") |>

    # Normalize street abbreviations
    str_replace_all("\\bRd\\.?\\b", "Road") |>
    str_replace_all("\\bSt\\.?\\b", "Street") |>
    str_replace_all("\\bAve\\.?\\b", "Avenue") |>
    str_replace_all("\\bBlvd\\.?\\b", "Boulevard") |>
    str_replace_all("\\bDr\\.?\\b", "Drive") |>

    # Normalize "a/k/a" aliases — keep only the first name
    str_remove_all("\\s+a/k/a.*") |>

    # Collapse multiple whitespace
    str_squish()
}

is_geocodable <- function(x) {
  # Must have either a house number OR a clearly identifiable road name
  # Vague entries: "[combined volume...]", "North Carver*", single "*", etc.
  !str_detect(x, "^\\[") &          # combined-volume bracket lines
    !str_detect(x, "^\\*+$") &      # lone asterisk lines
    str_length(x) > 5               # catch any remaining stubs
}

default_town  <- "Plymouth, MA"

mine_locs <- mine_locs |>
  mutate(
    address_clean = clean_address(location),

    # Append town context for geocoding
    address_full  = paste0(address_clean, ", ", default_town),

    # Known multi-town overrides (keyword-based)
    address_full  = case_when(
      str_detect(location, "Wareham")  ~ paste0(address_clean, ", Wareham, MA"),
      str_detect(location, "Halifax")  ~ paste0(address_clean, ", Halifax, MA"),
      str_detect(location, "Kingston") ~ paste0(address_clean, ", Kingston, MA"),
      str_detect(location, "Carver")   ~ paste0(address_clean, ", Carver, MA"),
      str_detect(location, "Bourne")   ~ paste0(address_clean, ", Bourne, MA"),
      str_detect(location, "Onset")    ~ paste0(address_clean, ", Onset, MA"),
      TRUE                             ~ address_full
    ),

    geocodable = is_geocodable(address_clean)
  )

to_geocode <- mine_locs |> filter(geocodable)

geocoded <- geocode_combine(
  to_geocode,
  queries = list(
    list(method = "census", address = "address_full"),
    list(method = "osm",    address = "address_full")
  ),
  global_params = list(),   # queries already reference the column directly
  lat    = "lat",
  long   = "lon"
)
```
#filter data for app plotting
```{r}
geocoded_2 <- geocoded|>
filter(!is.na(lat))
```


# create leaflet plot

```{r}
leaflet(geocoded) %>%
  addTiles() %>% 
  #addProviderTiles(providers$CartoDB.Positron)%>% 
  addProviderTiles(providers$Esri.WorldImagery)%>% 
  addCircleMarkers(data = geocoded,
             lng = ~lon, 
             lat =  ~lat, 
             radius = 8,
             #radius = ~volume_norm * 10,
             color = "green",
             fill = "green", 
             opacity = 1,
             popup = ~paste("<strong>Owner:</strong> ", owner, "<br>",
                            "<strong>Size (acres):</strong> ", size, "<br>",
                            "<strong>Volume Extracted:</strong> ", volume, "<br>"))
             #popup = ~paste("<strong>Start Date:</strong> ", incident_start_date, "<br>",
                            #"<strong>Harms Reported:</strong> ", harms_list, "<br>",
                            #"<strong>Comment:</strong> ", comment2),
                          #clusterOptions = markerClusterOptions()) %>%
  
  #originaldata 
   #addCircleMarkers(data = data,
             #lng = ~long, 
             #lat =  ~lat, 
             #radius = 5,
             #color = "yellow") %>%
  #markerClusterOptions(
      #spiderfyOnMaxZoom = FALSE,
      #disableClusteringAtZoom = TRUE) %>%  #I dont think this does anything...
  #labelOptions(
    #opacity = 1,
    #textsize = "30px"
  #)


ggplot(mine_locs, aes(x = size, y=volume))+
  geom_point()

mine_locs <- mine_locs |>
  mutate(
    mining_reason_clean = case_when(
      # Cranberry + Solar combos first (before individual matches)
      str_detect(tolower(mining_reason), "cranberry") & 
        str_detect(tolower(mining_reason), "solar")       ~ "Cranberry/Solar",
      
      # Cranberry (any variation)
      str_detect(tolower(mining_reason), "cranberry|blueberry") ~ "Cranberry",
      
      # Solar (any variation)
      str_detect(tolower(mining_reason), "solar")         ~ "Solar",
      
      # Development/Subdivision
      str_detect(tolower(mining_reason), "subdivision|residential|new construction|development|hide church") ~ "Development",
      
      # Commercial/Industrial
      str_detect(tolower(mining_reason), "commercial|commericia|business|industrial|mining") ~ "Commercial/Industrial",
      
      # Golf
      str_detect(tolower(mining_reason), "golf")          ~ "Golf",
      
      # Agriculture (non-cranberry)
      str_detect(tolower(mining_reason), "agriculture|reconfigure bogs") ~ "Agriculture",
      
      # Passthrough for NA and anything unmatched
      is.na(mining_reason)                                ~ NA_character_,
      TRUE                                                ~ mining_reason
    )
  )

# Check consolidation results
table(mine_locs$mining_reason_clean, useNA = "always")

ggplot(mine_locs, aes(x = fct_infreq(mining_reason_clean)))+
  geom_bar(fill = "dodgerblue3", color = "dodgerblue3")

```

# trying to pull up to date ws/wd data
```{r}
get_openmeteo_wind <- function(lat, lon, start_date, end_date, tz = "America/New_York") {
  
  resp <- request("https://archive-api.open-meteo.com/v1/archive") |>
    req_url_query(
      latitude              = lat,
      longitude             = lon,
      start_date            = as.character(start_date),
      end_date              = as.character(end_date),
      hourly                = "wind_speed_10m,wind_gusts_10m",
      wind_speed_unit       = "mph",
      timezone              = tz
    ) |>
    req_perform() |>
    resp_body_json()
  
  data.frame(
    date                   = as.POSIXct(unlist(resp$hourly$time), format = "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M", tz = tz),
    hourly_wind_speed      = unlist(resp$hourly$wind_speed_10m),
    hourly_wind_gust_speed = unlist(resp$hourly$wind_gusts_10m)
  )
}

# Usage
plym_weather_fresh <- get_openmeteo_wind(
  lat        = 41.9090,
  lon        = -70.7279,
  start_date = "2025-01-01",
  end_date   = Sys.Date()
)

ggplot(plym_weather_fresh, aes(x = date)) +
  geom_point(aes(y = hourly_wind_speed), size = .1)+
  geom_line(aes(y = hourly_wind_speed),linewidth = .01)+
  geom_point(aes(y = hourly_wind_gust_speed), size = 0.75, color = 'red', shape = 3)+
  theme_classic()+
  labs(x = "Date",
       y = "Wind Speed (MPH)")
```
